ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "native_language" TEXT /* Native language of the participant */,
  "bilingual" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant is bilingual */,
  "grow_up_region" TEXT /* Region in which the participant grew up */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "linguistic_studies" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has any formal linguistic studies */,
  "professional_background" TEXT /* Professional background or occupation of the participant */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has given consent for their data to be used in research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., phonetic, phonological, sociolinguistic) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "research_team" TEXT /* Team or researchers conducting the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the results of the experiment have been published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_files" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who contributed the audio */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the audio */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the audio recording */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the audio in seconds */,
  "glottal_stop" INTEGER /* Indicates if a glottal stop is present in the audio */,
  "recording_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for recording */,
  "recording_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the recording was made (e.g., studio, field) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the audio file (e.g., WAV, MP3) */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the audio file */,
  "bit_depth" INTEGER /* Bit depth of the audio file */,
  "recording_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the recording process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_files_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation entry */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file being annotated */,
  "deletion_morph" TEXT /* Deletion morphology noted during assessment */,
  "deviant_pronun" TEXT /* Deviant pronunciation observed */,
  "accentuation" TEXT /* Accentuation pattern classified */,
  "annotator" TEXT /* Name of the annotator */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of syllables in the audio */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., phonetic, phonological, morphological) */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., in progress, completed, reviewed) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the annotation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "linguistic_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature entry */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file associated with the feature */,
  "word_dur" REAL /* Total duration of the word in seconds */,
  "syll_num" INTEGER /* Number of syllables in the word */,
  "seg_num" INTEGER /* Number of segments in the audio */,
  "consonant_dur" REAL /* Total consonant duration in seconds */,
  "prec_seg" TEXT /* Preceding segment type */,
  "foll_seg" TEXT /* Following segment type */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the linguistic feature (e.g., phonetic, phonological, morphological) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the feature */,
  "feature_source" TEXT /* Source or method used to extract the feature */,
  "feature_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the feature extraction (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_linguistic_features_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency entry */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file associated with the frequency */,
  "word_form_frequency_bnc" INTEGER /* Frequency of the word form in the British National Corpus (BNC) */,
  "word_form_frequency_all_coca" INTEGER /* Frequency of the word form in the Corpus of Contemporary American English (COCA) */,
  "word_form_frequency_spoken_coca" INTEGER /* Frequency of the spoken word form in COCA */,
  "corpus_name" TEXT /* Name of the corpus used for frequency metrics */,
  "frequency_source" TEXT /* Source of the frequency data (e.g., BNC, COCA) */,
  "frequency_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the frequency metrics (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_frequencies_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stress_patterns" (
  "stress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stress pattern entry */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file associated with the stress pattern */,
  "affix_stress" TEXT /* Stress condition on affix */,
  "base_initial_stress" TEXT /* Initial stress on the base */,
  "base_final_stress" TEXT /* Final stress on the base */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of the stress pattern (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "pattern_source" TEXT /* Source or method used to determine the stress pattern */,
  "pattern_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the stress pattern (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_patterns_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corpus_data" (
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corpus data entry */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file associated with the corpus data */,
  "in_corpus" INTEGER /* Indicates if the word is in the corpus */,
  "orthography" TEXT /* Orthographic representation of the word */,
  "corpus_type" TEXT /* Type of the corpus (e.g., written, spoken) */,
  "corpus_size" INTEGER /* Size of the corpus in terms of words or sentences */,
  "corpus_year" INTEGER /* Year the corpus was compiled */,
  "corpus_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the corpus data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corpus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corpus_data_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the audio file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the audio file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, annotator, administrator) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the audio file */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)
